tagline: AI-powered coding agent for complex work

extension.description: Autonomous coding agent right in your IDE, capable of creating/editing files, running commands, using the browser, and more with your permission every step of the way.

cli.description: Autonomous coding agent CLI - capable of creating/editing files, running commands, using the browser, and more

copy.aboutDescription: An AI assistant that can use your CLI and editor. Vector can handle complex software development tasks step-by-step with tools that let it create and edit files, explore large projects, use the browser, and execute terminal commands after you grant permission.
copy.telemetryDescription: Vector collects error and usage data to help improve the product. No code, prompts, or personal information are ever sent.
